title: Seeds, Origins, Paths, Query Space, Budgets, and Stop Policy · Contract Workshop
summary: A public-interest site-quality team incrementally builds bounded crawl-scope policy from original fixed response and HTML fixtures while retaining earlier authorization, HTTP, URL, provenance, politeness, accessibility, testing, security, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of bounded crawl-scope policy while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Record each seed URL, stakeholder, purpose, authorization source, expected content class, and crawl revision.
Define allowed schemes, normalized hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and cross-origin resources with deny-by-default rules.
Express permitted paths, methods, query keys, values, pagination, fragments, and content types as testable admission rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Seed Identity
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop site-quality team handles case 1590 during a multilingual public-service site review. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate seed identity, origin and path admission, resource budgets, and automatic and manual stop policy; the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure; then replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-stop-and-contact-policy-199m08
# Competency: scraper-stop-and-contact-policy.
# Case 4237: a privacy-minimized internal crawl.
# Operating constraint: all network and parser work must remain below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: inject one retry, cancellation, queue, checkpoint, or output failure and recover cleanly.
def evidence_scraper_stop_and_contact_policy_199m08(admitted_origins: int = 1, admitted_paths: int = 8, page_budget: int = 240, byte_budget: int = 12000000, stop_paths: int = 5) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_199m08 = "199m08-80m991-4237"
    assert evidence_variant_199m08
    evidence_axes_199m08 = (
        "authorization199m08",
        "url4237",
        "response80m991",
        "tree199m084237",
        "frontier4237199m08",
        "report80m9914237",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_199m08)) == 6
    if admitted_origins != 1:
        return False, admitted_origins, "origin-scope"
    if admitted_paths < 1:
        return False, admitted_paths, "path-policy"
    if page_budget < 1 or byte_budget < 1024:
        return False, page_budget, "resource-budget"
    if stop_paths < 3:
        return False, stop_paths, "stop-policy"
    assert admitted_origins == 1 and stop_paths >= 3
    return True, page_budget, "bounded-crawl-scope"
